pom.xml.general_idea: Update Mockito dependency to version 3.x which requires Java 8+ and aligns with JUnit 5 integration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may lack compatibility with JUnit 5 extensions or newer Java features; specific API changes in Mockito 3+ might be required by updated test code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Jedis client library to version 3.3.0 to support newer Redis features and Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jedis versions may have compatibility issues with Java 11 or lack support for newer Redis protocols/features used in the updated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Guava library to version 29.0-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 11 and access to newer utilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may not be fully compatible with Java 11 or may lack classes/methods used in the updated codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Commons IO library to version 2.7 for bug fixes and Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Commons IO versions may have issues with Java 11 module system or lack necessary fixes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Data Redis dependency as it is no longer required for the core functionality.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in the project.
Add Hutool utility library to provide common Java utilities.
Add Gson library for JSON processing capabilities.
Add Commons Lang3, Collections4, BeanUtils, Codec, and Compress libraries for enhanced utility functions.
Add Awaitility library for asynchronous testing support.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to disable parallel execution and fork reuse for stability.
Add Spotless plugin for automatic code formatting and style enforcement.
Add Checkstyle plugin with Google style guide for code quality checks.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Configure Nexus Staging plugin for deploying releases to Sonatype OSSRH.
Configure GPG plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Update Maven Release plugin configuration for smoother release process.
Update Maven Source plugin to use jar-no-fork goal for better integration.
Add dependency management section to centralize version control for dependencies.
Add plugin management section to centralize version control for plugins.
Update project metadata including groupId, version, and developer information.
Update SCM and distribution management URLs to point to new repository and Sonatype OSSRH.
Add reporting section for checkstyle reports.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Refactor RedisServer to extend AbstractRedisInstance, moving lifecycle management to the base class.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: public class RedisServer { ... private volatile boolean active = false; private Process redisProcess; ... public synchronized void start() ... public synchronized void stop() ...

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Replace Guava Files.write with standard Java IO or base class handling for config file creation.
Replace Guava Strings.isNullOrEmpty with standard Java checks or base class handling.
Remove manual OS detection logic in favor of a provider pattern or base class implementation.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: private static enum RedisRunScriptEnum { ... public static String getRedisRunScript() { ... } }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Remove manual process start/stop and readiness checking logic, delegating to AbstractRedisInstance.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: private void awaitRedisServerReady() throws IOException { ... } private ProcessBuilder createRedisProcessBuilder() { ... }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Update the regex pattern for detecting Redis server readiness to be more robust.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: private static final String REDIS_READY_PATTERN = ".*The server is now ready to accept connections on port.*";
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.after: private static final String REDIS_READY_PATTERN = ".*(R|r)eady to accept connections.*";

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add Lombok Slf4j annotation for logging instead of manual logger initialization or removal of logging.
Introduce RedisServerExecProvider interface to abstract executable resolution.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.after: public RedisServer(RedisServerExecProvider redisExecProvider, int port) throws IOException { ... }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Rename Builder class to RedisServerBuilder for clarity.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: public static class Builder { ... } public static Builder builder() { ... }
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.after: public static RedisServerBuilder builder() { return new RedisServerBuilder(); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Change port parameter type from Integer to int in constructors to allow primitive usage.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.before: public RedisServer(Integer port) ... public RedisServer(File executable, Integer port)
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.after: public RedisServer(int port) ... public RedisServer(File executable, int port)

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Handle the return value of setExecutable to address potential platform-specific failures or strict compiler checks regarding ignored boolean results.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.why_exists: On some platforms or configurations, setExecutable may fail silently or return false, leading to runtime errors when executing the file; ignoring the return value is considered bad practice and may be flagged by strict linters or future JDK versions.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Return null if setExecutable fails to prevent runtime execution errors.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.why_exists: If setExecutable returns false, the file is not executable, and attempting to run it would cause a runtime exception (e.g., 'Permission denied').

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reformat indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.before:
public static File extractExecutableFromJar(String executable) throws IOException {
        File tmpDir = Files.createTempDir();
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.after:
public static File extractExecutableFromJar(String executable) throws IOException {
    File tmpDir = Files.createTempDir();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reorder imports to group third-party libraries together.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Comment out the entire RedisServerClusterTest class to disable the test.
Add new test cases for Redis server functionality.
Refactor test to use dynamic port instead of hardcoded 6379.
